sentences.target: La qualité est bonne dans ce café.
sentences.reading: /la ka.li.te ɛ bɔn dɑ̃ sə ka.fe/

translations.fr: La qualité est bonne dans ce café.
translations.ipa: /la ka.li.te ɛ bɔn dɑ̃ sə ka.fe/
translations.en: The quality is good in this café.
translations.es: La calidad es buena en este café.
translations.de: Die Qualität ist in diesem Café gut.
translations.it: La qualità è buona in questo caffè.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家咖啡馆的品质很好。
translations.yue: 呢間咖啡店嘅品質好好。
translations.pt: A qualidade é boa neste café.
translations.vi: Chất lượng ở quán cà phê này tốt.
translations.nl: De kwaliteit is goed in dit café.
translations.hu: Ebben a kávézóban jó a minőség.
translations.hi: इस कैफ़े में गुणवत्ता अच्छी है.
translations.pl: W tej kawiarni jakość jest dobra.
translations.el: Η ποιότητα είναι καλή σε αυτήν την καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Kvaliteten er god på denne kafeen.
translations.sv: Kvaliteten är bra på det här kaféet.
translations.ro: Calitatea este bună în această cafenea.
translations.cs: V této kavárně je kvalita dobrá.
translations.da: Kvaliteten er god på denne café.
translations.ja: このカフェの質は良いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner introducing the noun 'qualité' as a specific, known referent.
Common noun serving as the subject of the copular clause.
Auxiliary 'être' used as a copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective; 3rd person singular present.
Predicate adjective describing 'qualité'; feminine singular agreeing with the subject.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner modifying 'café'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans', head of the locative PP.

sentences.target: On veut de la qualité ici.

translations.fr: On veut de la qualité ici.
translations.vi: Ở đây chúng tôi muốn chất lượng.
translations.ja: ここでは品質を求めます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as the subject; generic agent.
Main verb in the present, 3rd person singular; expresses desire.
Preposition forming the partitive construction 'de la' before a mass noun.
Article component of the partitive 'de la', signaling an indefinite quantity of 'qualité'.
Common noun; complement of the verb via the partitive 'de la' (object of desire).
Locative adverb modifying the clause, indicating place.

sentences.target: Je compare la qualité de ces pommes.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃.paʁ la ka.li.te də se pɔm/

translations.fr: Je compare la qualité de ces pommes.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃.paʁ la ka.li.te də se pɔm/
translations.en: I compare the quality of these apples.
translations.es: Comparo la calidad de estas manzanas.
translations.de: Ich vergleiche die Qualität dieser Äpfel.
translations.it: Confronto la qualità di queste mele.
translations.zh-Hans: 我比较这些苹果的质量。
translations.yue: 我比較呢啲蘋果嘅質素。
translations.pt: Eu comparo a qualidade destas maçãs.
translations.he: אני משווה את האיכות של התפוחים האלה.
translations.vi: Tôi so sánh chất lượng của những quả táo này.
translations.nl: Ik vergelijk de kwaliteit van deze appels.
translations.hu: Összehasonlítom ezeknek az almáknak a minőségét.
translations.hi: मैं इन सेबों की गुणवत्ता की तुलना करता हूँ.
translations.el: Συγκρίνω την ποιότητα αυτών των μήλων.
translations.nb: Jeg sammenligner kvaliteten på disse eplene.
translations.sv: Jag jämför kvaliteten på dessa äpplen.
translations.da: Jeg sammenligner kvaliteten af disse æbler.
translations.ja: これらのりんごの品質を比較します。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular personal pronoun functioning as the subject.
Main verb in the present, 1st person singular; head of the predicate.
Definite article determining 'qualité' as a specific referent.
Common noun; direct object of 'compare'.
Preposition marking a genitive/possessive complement of the noun 'qualité'.
Demonstrative determiner, plural, modifying 'pommes'.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition 'de', specifying the domain of the quality.

sentences.target: Vous vérifiez la qualité avant d'acheter.

translations.fr: Vous vérifiez la qualité avant d'acheter.
translations.en: You check the quality before buying.
translations.es: Ustedes revisan la calidad antes de comprar.
translations.de: Sie prüfen die Qualität vor dem Kauf.
translations.it: Controllate la qualità prima di acquistare.
translations.zh-Hans: 你们在购买前检查质量。
translations.yue: 你哋喺買之前檢查質素。
translations.pt: Vocês verificam a qualidade antes de comprar.
translations.he: אתם בודקים את האיכות לפני הקנייה.
translations.tr: Satın almadan önce kaliteyi kontrol edersiniz.
translations.vi: Bạn kiểm tra chất lượng trước khi mua.
translations.nl: Jullie controleren de kwaliteit voor aankoop.
translations.hi: खरीदने से पहले आप गुणवत्ता की जाँच करते हैं.
translations.el: Ελέγχετε την ποιότητα πριν από την αγορά.
translations.nb: Dere sjekker kvaliteten før dere kjøper.
translations.ro: Verificați calitatea înainte de a cumpăra.
translations.da: I tjekker kvaliteten før I køber.
translations.ja: 購入前に品質を確認します。

tokens.explanation: Second-person personal pronoun serving as the subject; plural/formal.
Main verb in the present, 2nd person plural; head of the predicate.
Definite article determining 'qualité'.
Common noun; direct object of 'vérifiez'.
Preposition introducing a temporal infinitival clause ('avant de' + infinitive).
Preposition 'de' contracted before a vowel; required after 'avant' before an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement to 'avant de', denoting the action that follows checking.
